ActionPlanTemplate.description: EA Action Plan for Water Resources and Waste Management projects. Lead agencies: BOR, USACE, DOE/BLM. Cooperating agencies: USFWS, EPA, NOAA-NMFS, BLM, State Environmental Agency. EIS likelihood: 30–70%. Litigation guardrails embedded at Draft and Deci...
ActionPlanTemplate.name: NEPA EA - Water Resources and Waste Management

actionPlanTemplateItem.name: Classify Project and Confirm EA Pathway

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Subject
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Classify Project and Confirm EA Pathway

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Priority
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: High

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Description
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Verify NEPA_Pathway__c = EA. Confirm project did not qualify for CE (extraordinary circumstance present or complexity flag elevated) and does not clearly require EIS. Document basis for EA determination. Reference: 40 CFR 1501.5.

actionPlanTemplateItem.name: Confirm EA Pathway and Significance Threshold

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Subject
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Confirm EA Pathway and Significance Threshold

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Priority
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: High

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Description
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Document why this project does not clearly meet EIS significance threshold (40 CFR 1501.3(b)). If public controversy is HIGH or EIS likelihood exceeds 70%, recommend elevating to EIS now. Citation: 40 CFR 1501.3; 40 CFR 1501.5.

actionPlanTemplateItem.name: Notify Cooperating Agencies: USFWS, EPA, NOAA-NMFS, BLM, State Environmental Agency

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Subject
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Notify Cooperating Agencies: USFWS, EPA, NOAA-NMFS, BLM, State Environmental Agency

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Priority
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Normal

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Description
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Send formal notifications to cooperating agencies: USFWS, EPA, NOAA-NMFS, BLM, State Environmental Agency. Per 40 CFR 1501.8, establish cooperation agreement and confirm roles. Record in Cooperating_Agencies__c field.

actionPlanTemplateItem.name: Submit Reclamation Act Authorization Application

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Subject
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Submit Reclamation Act Authorization Application

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Priority
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: High

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Description
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Submit Reclamation Act Authorization (irrigation/water supply). Citation: 43 USC 391. Record application number and submission date in Required_Permits__c. Do not allow permitting to bottleneck EA preparation — run concurrently.

actionPlanTemplateItem.name: Submit CWA Section 404 Individual Permit Application

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Subject
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Submit CWA Section 404 Individual Permit Application

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Priority
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: High

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Description
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Submit CWA Section 404 Individual Permit. Citation: 33 USC 1344. Record application number and submission date in Required_Permits__c. Do not allow permitting to bottleneck EA preparation — run concurrently.

actionPlanTemplateItem.name: Submit CWA Section 401 Water Quality Certification Application

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Subject
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Submit CWA Section 401 Water Quality Certification Application

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Priority
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: High

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Description
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Submit CWA Section 401 Water Quality Certification. Citation: 33 USC 1341. Record application number and submission date in Required_Permits__c. Do not allow permitting to bottleneck EA preparation — run concurrently.

actionPlanTemplateItem.name: Submit Rivers and Harbors Act Section 10 Application

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Subject
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Submit Rivers and Harbors Act Section 10 Application

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Priority
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Normal

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Description
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Submit Rivers and Harbors Act Section 10 (structures in navigable waters). Citation: 33 USC 403. Record application number and submission date in Required_Permits__c. Do not allow permitting to bottleneck EA preparation — run concurrently.

actionPlanTemplateItem.name: Submit RCRA Permit Application

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Subject
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Submit RCRA Permit Application

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Priority
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Normal

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Description
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Submit RCRA Permit (waste facilities). Citation: 42 USC 6925. Record application number and submission date in Required_Permits__c. Do not allow permitting to bottleneck EA preparation — run concurrently.

actionPlanTemplateItem.name: Submit CAA Permit Application

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Subject
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Submit CAA Permit Application

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Priority
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Normal

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Description
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Submit CAA Permit (waste facilities with air emissions). Citation: 42 USC 7401. Record application number and submission date in Required_Permits__c. Do not allow permitting to bottleneck EA preparation — run concurrently.

actionPlanTemplateItem.name: Submit ESA Section 7 Consultation Application

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Subject
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Submit ESA Section 7 Consultation Application

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Priority
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: High

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Description
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Submit ESA Section 7 Consultation. Citation: 16 USC 1536. Record application number and submission date in Required_Permits__c. Do not allow permitting to bottleneck EA preparation — run concurrently.

actionPlanTemplateItem.name: Initiate NHPA Section 106 Consultation

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Subject
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Initiate NHPA Section 106 Consultation

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Priority
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Normal

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Description
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Begin NHPA Section 106 Consultation. Track status in Adjacent_Statutes__c field. ESA Section 7 consultation must be concluded before FONSI can be signed — do not delay initiation. Citation: applicable statute per consultation type.

actionPlanTemplateItem.name: Initiate Wild and Scenic Rivers Act Compatibility Review

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Subject
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Initiate Wild and Scenic Rivers Act Compatibility Review

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Priority
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: High

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Description
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Begin Wild and Scenic Rivers Act Compatibility Review. Track status in Adjacent_Statutes__c field. ESA Section 7 consultation must be concluded before FONSI can be signed — do not delay initiation. Citation: applicable statute per consultation type.

actionPlanTemplateItem.name: Initiate Tribal Water Rights Consultation

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Subject
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Initiate Tribal Water Rights Consultation

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Priority
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: High

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Description
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Begin Tribal Water Rights Consultation. Track status in Adjacent_Statutes__c field. ESA Section 7 consultation must be concluded before FONSI can be signed — do not delay initiation. Citation: applicable statute per consultation type.

actionPlanTemplateItem.name: Initiate MSA Essential Fish Habitat Consultation

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Subject
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Initiate MSA Essential Fish Habitat Consultation

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Priority
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Normal

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Description
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Begin MSA Essential Fish Habitat Consultation. Track status in Adjacent_Statutes__c field. ESA Section 7 consultation must be concluded before FONSI can be signed — do not delay initiation. Citation: applicable statute per consultation type.

actionPlanTemplateItem.name: Initiate Floodplain Management Review (E.O. 11988)

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Subject
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Initiate Floodplain Management Review (E.O. 11988)

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Priority
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Normal

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Description
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Begin Floodplain Management Review (E.O. 11988). Track status in Adjacent_Statutes__c field. ESA Section 7 consultation must be concluded before FONSI can be signed — do not delay initiation. Citation: applicable statute per consultation type.

actionPlanTemplateItem.name: Prepare Draft EA

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Subject
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Prepare Draft EA

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Priority
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: High

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Description
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Prepare Draft Environmental Assessment per 40 CFR 1501.5. EA must include: purpose and need, alternatives (including no-action), affected environment, environmental consequences, mitigation measures, agencies and persons consulted. Citation: 40 CFR 1501.5; 42 USC 4332(2)(C).

actionPlanTemplateItem.name: Complete Cumulative and Connected Actions Analysis [BLOCKING — Rank #1 Litigation Failure]

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Subject
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Complete Cumulative and Connected Actions Analysis [BLOCKING — Rank #1 Litigation Failure]

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Priority
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: High

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Description
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: BLOCKING TASK — this is the #1 procedural failure in NEPA litigation. Analyze cumulative and connected actions for this project. Connected actions = other federal approvals that are closely related and must be discussed together per 40 CFR 1501.3(b)(1). Cumulative actions = impacts of this project combined with other past, present, and reasonably foreseeable actions. Set Cumulative_Analysis_Complete__c = TRUE only after independent review. FONSI cannot be signed until this field is TRUE. Case law: 250 F. Supp. 3d 773. Citations: 40 CFR 1501.3(b); 40 CFR 1508.1(g)(3); 40 CFR 1508.25.

actionPlanTemplateItem.name: Open 30-Day Public Comment Period on Draft EA

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Subject
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Open 30-Day Public Comment Period on Draft EA

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Priority
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: High

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Description
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Circulate Draft EA for public review per 40 CFR 1506.6. While not statutorily required for all EAs, a 30-day public comment period significantly reduces litigation risk on significance determinations. Post to agency website and Federal Register if practicable. Create nepa_engagement__c record with Event_Type__c = Public_Hearing if scoping meeting held. Citation: 40 CFR 1501.5(e); 40 CFR 1506.6.

actionPlanTemplateItem.name: Issue Final EA and Finding of No Significant Impact (FONSI) [BLOCKING]

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Subject
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Issue Final EA and Finding of No Significant Impact (FONSI) [BLOCKING]

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Priority
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: High

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Description
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: BLOCKING TASK — FONSI is required to close the EA pathway without an EIS. Final EA must incorporate responses to all substantive public comments. FONSI must explain why the action will not have significant environmental effects (40 CFR 1501.6). Attach ContentVersion records: Doc_Type__c = EA (Final EA) and Doc_Type__c = FONSI. ESA Section 7 consultation must be concluded before signing. If public controversy or new information arises, consider supplemental EA or elevation to EIS. Citation: 40 CFR 1501.5; 40 CFR 1501.6; 42 USC 4332(2)(C).

actionPlanTemplateItem.name: Solicitor Review if Statutory NEPA Waiver Cited (Conditional — Rank #2 Litigation Failure)

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Subject
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Solicitor Review if Statutory NEPA Waiver Cited (Conditional — Rank #2 Litigation Failure)

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Priority
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: High

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Description
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: CONDITIONAL TASK — complete ONLY if Statutory_Waiver_Cited__c = TRUE. Obtain OGC/Solicitor legal sufficiency memo confirming: (a) valid underlying funding/authorization, (b) applicability of the cited waiver provision. Set Solicitor_Concurrence__c = true after Solicitor sign-off. Without this memo, the FONSI/decision is at HIGH litigation risk. Case law: 379 F. Supp. 3d 883. Citation: 42 USC 4332(2)(C); 40 CFR 1501.4.

actionPlanTemplateItem.name: Index Administrative Record Documents [BLOCKING]

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Subject
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Index Administrative Record Documents [BLOCKING]

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Priority
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: High

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Description
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: BLOCKING TASK — AR must be indexed before Stage__c can move to AR_Lock. Required EA AR documents: Draft EA (if circulated), Final EA, FONSI, Cumulative/Connected Actions Analysis memo, ESA consultation correspondence, NHPA Section 106 correspondence, permit applications and authorizations, and public comment responses. Set AR_Index_Position__c on each ContentVersion. Citation: 40 CFR 1505.2; APA 5 USC 706.
